responsibilities: • develop written, video, and presentation -based finance content   • create study material, practice questions, and case studies   • simplify technical finance topics for different learning levels   • update content based on regulatory and syllabus changes   • collaborate with trainers, designers, and video teams   • ensure accuracy, clarity, and learner engagement
qualifications: • ca or fin ance professional with strong writing skills   • deep conceptual knowledge and clarity of expression   • experience in edtech or content creation preferred
